name: audit log: keys matching --redact-keys (default: token, secret, password, key) are replaced with "<REDACTED>"
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/audit-log.sh" --append --file "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl" --event login --actor user --data '{"token":"abc","name":"sid"}' && grep -E '"token":"<REDACTED>"' .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && grep -E '"name":"sid"' .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
